meta.title: Awards & Achievements
meta.description: Track player's awards and achievements progress

eliteOG.title: OG Thief
eliteOG.description: You prefer to do it the good old way.
eliteOG.howTo: Complete all elite challenges for Original Heists.

cmmOG.title: Goodfellas
cmmOG.description: You made a fortune with a solid team of 4.
cmmOG.howTo: Complete Criminal Mastermind for Original Heists.

eliteDoomsday.title: Saviour
eliteDoomsday.description: You saved the world with elegance.
eliteDoomsday.howTo: Complete all elite challenges for Doomsday Heists.

cmmDoomsday.title: Mission Impossible
cmmDoomsday.description: Apocolypse averted and no one died… maybe except for Avon.
cmmDoomsday.howTo: Complete Criminal Mastermind for Doomsday Heists.

eliteDC.title: Duggan's Nightmare
eliteDC.description: Keep the lights on in my vault.
eliteDC.howTo: Complete all elite challenges for the Diamond Casino Heist.

eliteCP.title: Overdue Sabbatical
eliteCP.howTo: Complete elite challenge for the Cayo Perico Heist.

level750.title: The World Is Yours
level750.description: Now you own the city… Do you?
level750.howTo: Reach level 750 and unlock a golden globe icon.

elite.title: Grand Theft Elite
elite.description: You joined high society of thieves.
elite.howTo: Complete all elite challenges for Original Heists, Doomsday Heists, Diamond Casino Heist, Cayo Perico Heist.

cmm.title: Mastermind
cmm.description: You are the Mastermind behind everything.
cmm.howTo: Complete all Criminal Mastermind challenges for Original Heists and Doomsday Heists.

collector.title: Collector
collector.howTo: Collect 100 Action Figures and 54 Playing Cards.

arena.title: Lord of Arena
arena.description: How much are you paying for electricity?
arena.howTo: Reach level 1000 on Arena Sponsorship Tier

lscm.title: Tuned For Speed
lscm.description: You are officially faster than light.
lscm.howTo: Reach level 1000 on LSCM Reputation and unlock Tuned For Speed Racing Suit.

rich.title: No One Richer
rich.description: Who could possibly be richer than you?
rich.howTo: Fill your mansion vault with 1 billion dollars.

thumbsup.title: Social Butterfly
thumbsup.description: You must be the prom queen.
thumbsup.howTo: Earn 1000 thumbs up for one of your creations.

exporter.title: Expert Smuggler
exporter.description: You smuggle more hypercars than Grotti makes.
exporter.howTo: Deliver 1000 Exotic Exports vehicles and receive the hidden text message.

arcade.title: Pro Ape
arcade.description: You have reached the peak of evolution

samaritan.title: Samaritan
samaritan.description: What took a nice person like you to Los Santos?
samaritan.howTo: Return stolen cash to a shop 50 times.

virgin.title: Virgin
virgin.description: You know there is a place called Vanilla Unicorn, right?
virgin.howTo: Reach level 500 without enjoying any private dances.

heist1000.title: Habitual Robber
heist1000.description: You didn't stop at making a living. You made it a life.

trinity.title: Trinity
trinity.description: Nothing can stop you on the way of ascension.
trinity.howTo: Reach level 1000 on character, LSCM and Arena.

achievements.title: Over Achiever
achievements.description: You always aim for the best.

author.title: Bun
author.description: This is a bun. And it tastes delicious.
